blockers.message: All 4 mutations use requireUser(ctx) — user-scoped instead of workspace-scoped. Kitab convention demands requirePermission(ctx, workspaceId, perm). Sanitizer must remodel during /rr-send.

Tables documentChecklists + documentTemplates are indexed by_user / by_country, not by_workspace, and table names are not slug-prefixed. Rename to document_checklist_items + document_checklist_templates with workspaceId column + by_workspace index before UP-sync.
4 raw <button> elements (CategoryFilter:32,50; ChecklistItemCard:31; CountryTemplateCard:101). Sanitizer should convert to <Button> from @/components/ui/button.
Indonesian UI copy hardcoded ("Template Dokumen per Negara", "Kerja Lokal", "Kerja Luar Negeri", "Pengingat", "Destinasi Populer"). Replace with t() / props before UP-sync.
Deep relative import '../../../../../convex/_generated/api'. Sanitizer should rewrite to '@convex/_generated/api' alias on push UP.
